fields.summary: Support REST for Node Attributes configurations
Support for Node Attribute Functionality, Phase 2

status.name: Open

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.

fields.description: This jira focusses on supporting mapping of Nodes to  Attributes through REST

fields.summary: Managing Centralized Node Attribute via RMWebServices.

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

comments.body: WIP patch for the REST modifications
[~Naganarasimha] Would like to have these changes in Hadoop, please let us know if [~BilwaST] and me can do the remaining work on this if you are fine. Thanks.
[~prabhujoseph], Glad that you and [~bilwa_st]  can take it forward, please go ahead and assign it to yourself!

Thanks [~Naganarasimha]. 

[~prabhujoseph] I have attached patch. Please review
